Typedefs | Functions
memories.h File Reference

Typed list of memory_t blocks. More...

#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include "list.h"
#include "memory.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t memories_t
 List of memory_t blocks.
 

Functions

static memories_t * memories_new (size_t size)
 Allocate a new memories list.
 
static void memories_free (memories_t *memories, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free a memories list and optionally each memory block.
 
static bool memories_add (memories_t *memories, memory_t *memory)
 Append a memory block to the list.
 
static memory_t * memories_get (const memories_t *memories, size_t index)
 Retrieve a memory block by index.
 
static size_t memories_size (const memories_t *memories)
 Return the current number of memory blocks.
 
static size_t memories_capacity (const memories_t *memories)
 Return the allocated capacity.
 
static bool memories_empty (const memories_t *memories)
 Check whether the list is empty.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides memories_t (a list_t specialization) together with construction, access and query helpers for managing collections of raw memory descriptors.

void(* free_func )(void *) )

[in]memoriesPointer to the list.
